name: Homemade Horsraddish Sauce - (Txvf47a)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the horseradish root using a grater.
2. In a bowl, combine 1/4 cup grated horseradish with 1 cup sour cream.
3. Stir in 2 teaspoons of lemon juice and 1 drop of Tabasco.
4. Mix until well combined.
5. Adjust the amount of horseradish or Tabasco to taste for a more intense flavor.
